article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage

briefs.title: BC Liquor Manufacturers Can Deliver Directly to Customers Until June 30, 2027
briefs.summary: BC's liquor and cannabis regulator has extended the rule allowing manufacturers to deliver products directly to retail customers from on-site stores or off-site storage, using their own staff or a third-party delivery service, until June 30, 2027.
briefs.action_required: Review Bulletin 25-03 to confirm your delivery operations meet the updated terms before June 30, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB direct delivery authorization for manufacturers — extension expires

briefs.article_title: Extension to direct delivery from off-site storage
